Gymnast Sunisa "Suni" Lee achieved a first three years ago in Tokyo, becoming the first Asian-American to win gold in the Olympicsâ All-Around competition.It came after teammate Simone Biles withdrew from the competition due to the âtwisties,â a mental block that causes gymnasts to lose their position while in midair.Lee told CGTNâs Dan Williams that she is determined to defend her title and continue to inspire other Asian-Americans to follow their dreams.
